tasks.subject: Task 1: Modelo Rating + migração Alembic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Criar o modelo ORM Rating e aplicar a migração que cria a tabela `ratings`.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/ratings/__init__.py`
- Create: `app/ratings/models.py`
- Create: `alembic/versions/<hash>_add_ratings_table.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Modelo `Rating` com todos os campos, UniqueConstraint e CheckConstraint
- [ ] `task migrate` aplica sem erros
- [ ] Migração não contém drops de índices não-relacionados

**Verify:** `cd back && uv run alembic upgrade head` → sem erros

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/ratings/__init__.py", "app/ratings/models.py", "alembic/versions/"], "verifyCommand": "cd back && uv run alembic upgrade head", "acceptanceCriteria": ["modelo Rating com todos os campos", "UniqueConstraint (transaction_id, rater_id)", "CheckConstraint stars 0-5", "migração aplica sem erros"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ConflictError + service.py + testes de serviço
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Adicionar ConflictError, implementar lógica de negócio e cobrir com testes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/common/exceptions.py`
- Create: `app/ratings/service.py`
- Create: `tests/test_ratings_service.py`

**Verify:** `cd back && uv run pytest tests/test_ratings_service.py -v` → todos passam

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/common/exceptions.py", "app/ratings/service.py", "tests/test_ratings_service.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd back && uv run pytest tests/test_ratings_service.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ConflictError retorna 409", "submit_rating valida status/participação/deduplicação", "ratee_id determinado corretamente", "_recalculate_reputation calcula floor(positives/total*100)", "get_user_ratings retorna lista ordenada"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Schemas + router + main.py + testes de router
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expor os dois endpoints HTTP e registrá-los na aplicação.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/ratings/schemas.py`
- Create: `app/ratings/router.py`
- Modify: `app/ratings/models.py` (adicionar relationship rater)
- Modify: `app/main.py`
- Create: `tests/test_ratings_router.py`

**Verify:** `cd back && uv run pytest tests/test_ratings_router.py -v` → todos passam

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/ratings/schemas.py", "app/ratings/router.py", "app/ratings/models.py", "app/main.py", "tests/test_ratings_router.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd back && uv run pytest tests/test_ratings_router.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /transactions/{id}/rate retorna 201", "GET /users/{id}/ratings retorna 200 sem auth", "400/403/404/409 nos casos de erro", "stars fora de 0-5 retorna 422"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
